main.description: A shared identity template that multiple characters can embody. The type, not the instance. Defines what something fundamentally is before any specific character performs it.

creatorDID.description: The permanent identity of the template's creator

worldReference.description: Reference to the world this template belongs to

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this template was created

canonicalCharacterReference.description: Reference to the canonical character instance of this template (if any)

instancePolicy.description: Who can create new character instances of this template — open (anyone), restricted (with approval), closed (no new instances)

canonicalReferencePolicy.description: How the canonical character reference behaves over time — fixed (never changes), updatable (originator can update), community (community consensus)

canonicalStatus.description: The canonical standing of this template

originType.description: The intellectual property status of this template
